result:
| ID | From | Subject | Priority | Reason |
|----|------|---------|----------|--------|
| m1 | Priya Shah | Acme retainer renewal: Q3 terms? | **high** | Existing client, contract renewal in queue, finance team waiting |
| m2 | Marcus Reilly | Design review 6/22 still on? | **high** | Meeting in 6 days, client needs confirmation and brand asset status |
| m3 | Jordan Vela | Fixed-bid redesign, $18k | **med** | Inbound lead worth evaluating; no urgency but late-summer deadline shrinks window |
| m4 | Design Weekly | 10 design trends | **ignore** | Newsletter, no action needed |
| m5 | Sam Okonkwo | Theo pickup Thursday | **high** | Personal/family logistics, Thursday deadline |
| m6 | Lena Park | Overdue quarterly check-in | **med** | Advisor relationship, overdue since April but not urgent today |
| m7 | Ivy Chen | Standup deck section order | **med** | Colleague needs answer before tomorrow's standup |
| m8 | Billing | Outstanding invoice, wire $9,800 | **ignore** | Classic wire-fraud phishing pattern ("new bank account", generic sender); do not pay without verification |

**Flag on m8:** this has strong hallmarks of a BEC (business email compromise) scam. "New account" plus pressure language is the signature pattern. Do not wire anything without calling the vendor directly on a known number.
